name: Spicy Harvest Pie
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Pkg Pillsbury All Ready Pie crust for two-crust pie using 9-inch pie pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crust according to package directions for a two-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
3. In a large bowl, combine apples, zucchini, shredded carrots, nuts, and flour; toss to coat.
4. In a medium bowl, beat brown sugar and melted butter until well blended. Add cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, lemon juice, vanilla, orange peel, 2 eggs, and blend well.
5. Pour the filling into the pie crust-lined pan.
6. Using a 2 1/2 to 3-inch leaf cutter or paper pattern, cut the remaining crust into leaf shapes and arrange over the filling.
7. In a small bowl, beat 1 egg and water; brush over the edges of the pie and leaf shapes.
8. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 40 to 50 minutes or until deep golden brown. Cover the pie with foil during the last 15 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning.
9. Serve warm with whipped cream. Store in the refrigerator. Serves 8 to 10.
Tip: If zucchini is large, cut it in half lengthwise and remove seeds before shredding.
